implementation-plan.reason: Plan chooses a small generated graph JSON plus static viewer, which fits the repo because there is no existing frontend package scaffold.

integration-readiness.reason: The graph ticket depends on the final audit ticket and keeps the registry as the source of truth instead of introducing manual graph state.

evidence-quality.reason: The proof plan covers node count equality, graph JSON parsing, local browser load, and visual legend/filter checks.

next_action: After TASK-0152, implement the graph generator and static viewer, then attach browser proof.
